name: VICOR CORP. Registered Shares D
summary: Vicor Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, and markets modular power components and power systems, based on a portfolio of patented technologies. The company serves customers in performance-critical applications, including enterprise and high-performance computing, industrial equipment, automation, robotics, telecom infrastructure, vehicles and transportation, and aerospace and defense electronics. Vicor is headquartered in Andover, Massachusetts.
